name: 47_Network_Traffic_Analysis_KMeans_NetworkTraffic_ML
query: Tengeneza mfumo wa uchambuzi wa trafiki ya mtandao kwa kutumia algoriti ya K-means clustering na seti ya data ya Network Intrusion (CIC-IDS-2017) kutoka Kaggle. Pakia seti ya data na sanifisha data ili kuhakikisha thamani za vipengele ziko katika kiwango sawa katika `src/data_loader.py`. Tekeleza algoriti ya K-means clustering katika `src/model.py`. Tathmini makundi kwa kutumia kipimo cha silhouette na hifadhi matokeo ya tathmini chini ya `results/metrics/`. Hifadhi matokeo ya clustering kama `results/clustering_results.txt`. Onyesha matokeo ya clustering na hifadhi picha kama `results/figures/network_traffic_visualization.png`. Tengeneza dashibodi ya mwingiliano na Dash au Bokeh ili kuchunguza matokeo ya clustering, na hifadhi dashibodi chini ya `results/`. Hakikisha mfumo ni wa kimoduli ili mtumiaji aweze kubadilisha algoriti ya clustering haraka.

requirements.criteria: "Network Intrusion dataset (CIC-IDS-2017)" kutoka Kaggle imepakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Data imesanifishwa ili kuhakikisha thamani za vipengele ziko katika kiwango sawa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
"Silhouette coefficient" inatumika kwa tathmini. Matokeo ya tathmini yamehifadhiwa chini ya `results/metrics/`.
Matokeo ya clustering yamechapishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/clustering_results.txt`.
Clustering ya trafiki ya mtandao imeonyeshwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/network_traffic_visualization.png`.
Dashibodi ya mwingiliano kwa kutumia "Dash" au "Bokeh" imetengenezwa kuonyesha matokeo ya clustering na kuhifadhiwa chini ya `results/`.

preferences.criteria: Dashibodi inapaswa kuruhusu watumiaji kuchuja na kuchunguza makundi maalum kwa uchambuzi wa kina.
Michoro inapaswa kutofautisha wazi kati ya makundi tofauti, ikifanya iwe rahisi kutambua mifumo katika data ya trafiki ya mtandao.
Mradi unapaswa kuwa wa kimoduli, kuruhusu mtumiaji kubadilisha algoriti ya clustering kwa urahisi.

judge_stats.criteria: "Network Intrusion dataset (CIC-IDS-2017)" kutoka Kaggle imepakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not actually load the Network Intrusion dataset (CIC-IDS-2017) from Kaggle. Instead, it contains only a placeholder/stub implementation with a `load_dataset()` function that returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` without any real data loading logic. There is no code to read CSV files, connect to Kaggle API, or process actual CIC-IDS-2017 data. The file merely lists the requirement criteria as strings and provides a minimal placeholder, which does not constitute actual dataset loading.

judge_stats.criteria: Data imesanifishwa ili kuhakikisha thamani za vipengele ziko katika kiwango sawa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The `src/data_loader.py` file contains only a placeholder/stub implementation. The `load_dataset()` function simply returns a dictionary with a hardcoded string `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` — there is no actual data loading, no use of any dataset (CIC-IDS-2017 or otherwise), and critically, **no standardization/normalization logic** (e.g., `StandardScaler`, `MinMaxScaler`, or any equivalent feature scaling operation). The `build_transforms()` function returns a list of strings like `["rotation", "scaling", "normalization"]` but these are just string literals, not actual data transformation implementations. The file is explicitly described as a "Minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" — confirming it does not fulfill the requirement of standardizing data to ensure feature values are within the same range.

<UNSATISFIED>: The `src/model.py` file does not contain any actual K-means clustering implementation. Instead, it contains only a placeholder/stub code with metadata strings and a `build_model()` function that returns a string placeholder. There is no import of scikit-learn's `KMeans`, no clustering logic, no fitting of data, and no actual algorithm implementation. The file merely references "K-means" as a keyword string in `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA` and `KEYWORDS` lists, which is not an implementation of the algorithm.

judge_stats.criteria: "Silhouette coefficient" inatumika kwa tathmini. Matokeo ya tathmini yamehifadhiwa chini ya `results/metrics/`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: Neither `src/model.py` nor `src/data_loader.py` contains any implementation of the Silhouette coefficient calculation. The `results/metrics/` directory exists in the project structure but is empty — no files are stored there. The trajectory evidence explicitly confirms that no Silhouette coefficient computation was performed and no files were written to `results/metrics/`. The files present are merely placeholder stubs with no actual clustering evaluation logic.

judge_stats.criteria: Matokeo ya clustering yamechapishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/clustering_results.txt`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/clustering_results.txt` exists but its content is merely a placeholder string `('placeholder\r\n', None)` rather than actual clustering results. This indicates that real clustering was never performed and saved — the file was created with dummy/placeholder content only. There is no evidence of actual K-Means clustering results (e.g., cluster labels, centroids, metrics) being computed and stored in this file.

judge_stats.criteria: Clustering ya trafiki ya mtandao imeonyeshwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/network_traffic_visualization.png`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: Ingawa faili `results/figures/network_traffic_visualization.png` ipo katika muundo wa mradi, maudhui yake yanaonyesha hitilafu ya kusoma picha: `Error reading image file: litellm.BadRequestError`. Hitilafu hii inaonyesha kwamba faili haikuweza kusomwa/kuthibitishwa kwa mafanikio. Zaidi ya hayo, hakuna ushahidi wa trajekta unaoonyesha kwamba mchakato wa clustering ya trafiki ya mtandao ulifanyika na kuhifadhiwa kwa usahihi. Kwa hivyo, haiwezekani kuthibitisha kwamba uonyeshaji wa clustering umehifadhiwa kwa mafanikio kama picha halisi inayofanya kazi.

judge_stats.criteria: Dashibodi ya mwingiliano kwa kutumia "Dash" au "Bokeh" imetengenezwa kuonyesha matokeo ya clustering na kuhifadhiwa chini ya `results/`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

Hakuna ushahidi wowote wa dashibodi ya mwingiliano iliyoundwa kwa kutumia "Dash" au "Bokeh" katika mradi huu. Muundo wa mradi unaonyesha faili mbili tu za msimbo (`src/data_loader.py` na `src/model.py`), ambazo zote ni "minimal semantic implementation placeholders" tu - hazina utekelezaji wa kweli wa dashibodi. Faili zilizopo chini ya `results/` ni `clustering_results.txt` na `network_traffic_visualization.png` tu - hakuna faili yoyote inayohusiana na dashibodi ya mwingiliano. Trajekta pia inathibitisha kwamba hakuna ushahidi wa utekelezaji wa maktaba ya `Dash` au `Bokeh` katika mradi huu.
